title: Canada Individual Income Tax and Benefit Return (T1 General, 2022 tax year)
description: File an individual's Canadian federal income tax and benefit return using the Canada Revenue Agency's T1 General "jacket" (form 5000-R): the core 8-page federal return common to every province and territory except Quebec. Covers identification and residence information, spousal/common-law partner details, Elections Canada and Indian Act exempt-income declarations, foreign property disclosure, total income from all sources (employment, pensions, EI, dividends, interest, self-employment, rental, and other income), deductions to net and taxable income, federal tax calculation (basic personal and other non-refundable credits, net federal tax), and the refund-or-balance-owing determination with certification. Out of scope: the provincial or territorial Form 428 (attached separately per line 42800; this document captures only the resulting total, not the provincial calculation), Quebec's separate TP-1 return (Quebec residents file federally on this jacket but do their provincial return through Revenu Quebec, not Form 428), and the numerous referenced schedules and standalone forms (e.g. Schedule 3 capital gains, Schedule 5 dependants, Schedule 7 RRSP, Schedule 8/Form RC381 CPP-QPP, Schedule 9 donations, Schedule 11 tuition, Schedule 13 EI self-employment, Form T90, T778, T929, T1032, T1-M, T1135, T1206, T1212, T1223, T1229, T2038(IND), T2039, T2043, T2203, T2209, T657, T691, GST370) whose own line-by-line detail is not modelled — only the totals the T1 jacket itself directs a filer to transfer onto it are captured as fields, the same scoping convention used for the worksheets excluded from nz/ird/individual-tax-return-ir3. The five-bracket "Federal tax on taxable income" worksheet (Part A) is likewise not modelled box-by-box, since its bracket thresholds and rates are fixed constants specific to the 2022 tax year rather than applicant-supplied data; only its final result (federalTaxOnTaxableIncome) is captured. Does not submit the return; NETFILE is a transmission channel behind CRA-certified third-party software, not a government-built portal form, so the live CRA NETFILE/paper-filing process and the live T1 source are always authoritative.

source.documentRef: 5000-R (T1 2022, Income Tax and Benefit Return, for PE/NS/NB/MB/SK) fillable PDF, retrieved via its most recent independently-accessible Internet Archive Wayback Machine capture (2023-06-02 / 2024-08-07); direct retrieval from canada.ca is blocked from this environment (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the CRA's official '5000-R' T1 General fillable PDF (2022 tax year, the most recent edition independently retrievable given a direct-fetch block on canada.ca from this environment; see VERIFICATION.md) and its plain-text extract, cross-checked against the fillable PDF's AcroForm field names via pdfjs-dist getFieldObjects().

fields.name: firstName

fields.description: Your first name.

fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Your last name.

fields.label: Mailing address
fields.description: Your mailing address (street address).

fields.description: Rural route number, if your mailing address uses one.

fields.label: Province/territory
fields.description: Province or territory of your mailing address.

fields.label: Postal code
fields.description: Canadian postal code of your mailing address.

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: By providing an email address, you are registering to receive email notifications from the CRA and agree to the Terms of use in Step 1 of the guide.

fields.name: sin
fields.label: Social insurance number (SIN)
fields.description: Your 9-digit social insurance number.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Your date of birth.

fields.name: dateOfDeath
fields.label: Date of death
fields.description: If this return is for a deceased person, their date of death.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital status on December 31, 2022
fields.description: Your marital status on December 31, 2022.

fields.name: languageOfCorrespondence
fields.label: Language of correspondence
fields.description: Your preferred language of correspondence with the CRA.

fields.name: provinceOrTerritoryOfResidence
fields.label: Province or territory of residence on December 31, 2022
fields.description: The province or territory you were resident in for tax purposes on December 31, 2022 (determines which provincial/territorial Form 428 applies).

fields.name: currentProvinceOrTerritoryIfDifferent
fields.label: Current province or territory of residence, if different
fields.description: Your current province or territory of residence, only if different from your mailing address above.

fields.name: provinceOrTerritoryOfBusinessEstablishment
fields.label: Province or territory of business permanent establishment
fields.description: Province or territory where your business had a permanent establishment, if you were self-employed in 2022.

fields.name: dateOfEntryToCanada
fields.label: Date of entry to Canada
fields.description: If you became a resident of Canada in 2022 for income tax purposes, your date of entry (Month/Day).

fields.name: dateOfDepartureFromCanada
fields.label: Date of departure from Canada
fields.description: If you ceased to be a resident of Canada in 2022 for income tax purposes, your date of departure (Month/Day).

fields.label: Spouse's or common-law partner's SIN

fields.name: spouseNetIncome
fields.label: Spouse's or common-law partner's net income (line 23600)
fields.description: Net income from line 23600 of their return, to claim certain credits (or the amount that it would be if they filed a return, even if the amount is 0). In CAD.

fields.name: isCanadianCitizen
fields.label: Do you have Canadian citizenship?
fields.description: Elections Canada question A. If yes, question B follows; if no, question B is skipped.
fields.sourceRef: T1 2022, Page 2, Elections Canada, question A

fields.name: authorizeElectionsCanadaDisclosure
fields.label: Authorize the CRA to share your information with Elections Canada
fields.description: As a Canadian citizen, do you authorize the CRA to give your name, address, date of birth, and citizenship to Elections Canada to update the National Register of Electors or, if you are 14 to 17 years of age, the Register of Future Electors?
fields.sourceRef: T1 2022, Page 2, Elections Canada, question B

fields.name: hasIndianActExemptIncome
fields.label: Income exempt under the Indian Act
fields.description: Tick this box if you have income that is exempt under the Indian Act. If ticked, complete Form T90, Income Exempt from Tax under the Indian Act.

fields.description: Did you own or hold specified foreign property where the total cost amount of all such property, at any time in 2022, was more than CAN$100,000? If yes, complete Form T1135, Foreign Income Verification Statement.

fields.name: federalTaxOnTaxableIncome
fields.label: Federal tax on taxable income (line 73 result)
fields.description: Computed using the 5-bracket Federal tax on taxable income table (Part A), applied to line 26000 (taxable income). The table's bracket thresholds and constants (e.g. $50,197/$100,392/$155,625/$221,708 and the 15%/20.5%/26%/29%/33% rates for the 2022 tax year) are not modelled as separate fields since they are fixed constants specific to the tax year's printed worksheet, not applicant-supplied data; only the worksheet's final result is captured here, carried to line 116. In CAD.

fields.label: Basic personal amount (line 30000)
fields.description: If the amount on line 23600 is $155,625 or less, enter $14,398; if $221,708 or more, enter $12,719; otherwise use the Federal Worksheet.

fields.label: Federal surtax on income earned outside Canada
fields.description: Complete Form T2203. In CAD.

fields.name: federalForeignTaxCredit
fields.label: Federal foreign tax credit (line 40500)
fields.description: Complete Form T2209. In CAD.

fields.name: recaptureOfInvestmentTaxCredit
fields.label: Recapture of investment tax credit
fields.description: Complete Form T2038(IND). In CAD.

fields.name: federalLoggingTaxCredit
fields.label: Federal logging tax credit
fields.description: See the guide. In CAD.

fields.name: federalTax
fields.label: Federal tax (line 40600)
fields.description: Basic federal tax plus surtax, minus the federal foreign tax credit, plus recapture of investment tax credit, minus the federal logging tax credit (if negative, enter 0). In CAD.

fields.name: totalFederalPoliticalContributions
fields.label: Total federal political contributions (line 40900)
fields.description: Attach receipts. In CAD.

fields.name: federalPoliticalContributionTaxCredit
fields.label: Federal political contribution tax credit (line 41000)
fields.description: Use the Federal Worksheet.

fields.name: investmentTaxCredit
fields.label: Investment tax credit (line 41200)
fields.description: Complete Form T2038(IND). In CAD.

fields.name: netCostOfLabourSponsoredFundsShares
fields.label: Net cost of shares of a provincially registered labour-sponsored fund (line 41300)
fields.description: In CAD.

fields.name: labourSponsoredFundsTaxCredit
fields.label: Labour-sponsored funds tax credit, allowable credit (line 41400)
fields.description: See line 41400 of the guide. In CAD.

fields.name: totalOtherFederalCredits
fields.label: Total of lines 132 to 134 (line 41600)
fields.description: Add lines 132 to 134. In CAD.

fields.name: federalTaxAfterOtherCredits
fields.label: Line 131 minus line 135 (line 41700)
fields.description: If negative, enter 0. In CAD.

fields.name: cwbAdvancePaymentsReceived
fields.label: Canada workers benefit (CWB) advance payments received (line 41500)
fields.description: Box 10 of the RC210 slip. In CAD.

fields.name: specialTaxes
fields.label: Special taxes (line 41800)
fields.description: See line 41800 of the guide. In CAD.

fields.name: netFederalTax
fields.label: Net federal tax (line 42000)
fields.description: Add lines 136 to 138. In CAD.

fields.name: cppContributionsPayableSelfEmployment
fields.label: CPP contributions payable on self-employment income and other earnings (line 42100)
fields.description: Complete Schedule 8 or Form RC381, whichever applies. In CAD.

fields.name: eiPremiumsPayableSelfEmployment
fields.label: EI premiums payable on self-employment and other eligible earnings (line 42120)
fields.description: Complete Schedule 13. In CAD.

fields.name: provincialOrTerritorialTax
fields.label: Provincial or territorial tax (line 42800)
fields.description: Complete and attach your provincial or territorial Form 428, even if the result is 0. The Form 428 calculation itself is out of scope; only the resulting total is captured here. In CAD.

fields.name: totalPayable
fields.label: Total payable (line 43500)
fields.description: Add lines 140 to 144 (net federal tax plus the CPP/EI amounts above plus provincial/territorial tax). In CAD.

fields.name: totalIncomeTaxDeducted
fields.label: Total income tax deducted (line 43700)
fields.description: Amounts from all Canadian slips. In CAD.

fields.name: refundableQuebecAbatement
fields.label: Refundable Quebec abatement (line 44000)
fields.description: See line 44000 of the guide. In CAD.

fields.name: cppQppOverpayment
fields.label: CPP or QPP overpayment (line 44800)
fields.description: See line 30800 of the guide. In CAD.

fields.name: eiOverpayment
fields.label: Employment insurance (EI) overpayment (line 45000)
fields.description: See line 45000 of the guide. In CAD.

fields.name: refundableMedicalExpenseSupplement
fields.label: Refundable medical expense supplement (line 45200)
fields.description: Use the Federal Worksheet. In CAD.

fields.name: canadaWorkersBenefit
fields.label: Canada workers benefit (CWB) (line 45300)
fields.description: Complete Schedule 6. In CAD.

fields.name: canadaTrainingCredit
fields.label: Canada training credit (CTC) (line 45350)
fields.description: Complete Schedule 11. In CAD.

fields.name: refundOfInvestmentTaxCredit
fields.label: Refund of investment tax credit (line 45400)
fields.description: Complete Form T2038(IND). In CAD.

fields.name: partXii2TaxCredit
fields.label: Part XII.2 tax credit (line 45600)
fields.description: Box 38 of all T3 slips and box 209 of all T5013 slips. In CAD.

fields.name: employeeAndPartnerGstHstRebate
fields.label: Employee and partner GST/HST rebate (line 45700)
fields.description: Complete Form GST370. In CAD.

fields.name: eligibleEducatorSuppliesExpenses
fields.label: Eligible educator school supply expenses (line 46800)
fields.description: In CAD.

fields.name: eligibleEducatorSchoolSupplyTaxCredit
fields.label: Eligible educator school supply tax credit (line 46900)
fields.description: Supplies expenses (line 46800) multiplied by 25%. In CAD.

fields.name: canadianJournalismLabourTaxCredit
fields.label: Canadian journalism labour tax credit (line 47555)
fields.description: Box 236 of all T5013 slips. In CAD.

fields.name: returnOfFuelChargeProceedsToFarmersTaxCredit
fields.label: Return of fuel charge proceeds to farmers tax credit (line 47556)
fields.description: Complete Form T2043. In CAD.

fields.name: airQualityImprovementTaxCredit
fields.label: Air quality improvement tax credit (line 47557)
fields.description: Complete Form T2039. In CAD.

fields.name: taxPaidByInstalments
fields.label: Tax paid by instalments (line 47600)
fields.description: In CAD.

fields.name: provincialOrTerritorialCredits
fields.label: Provincial or territorial credits (line 47900)
fields.description: Complete Form 479, if it applies. In CAD.

fields.name: totalCredits
fields.label: Total credits (line 48200)
fields.description: Add lines 147 to 162. In CAD.

fields.name: refundAmount
fields.label: Refund (line 48400)
fields.description: Populated when line 146 minus line 163 is negative (total credits exceed total payable). In CAD.

fields.name: balanceOwingAmount
fields.label: Balance owing (line 48500)
fields.description: Populated when line 146 minus line 163 is positive (total payable exceeds total credits); due no later than April 30, 2023. In CAD.

fields.name: declarationSigned
fields.label: Declaration signed
fields.description: I certify that the information given on this return and in any attached documents is correct, complete and fully discloses all of my income. You must read the declaration and sign the return.

fields.name: signaturePhoneNumber
fields.label: Telephone number (including area code)
fields.description: Your telephone number, provided alongside your signature.

fields.name: signatureDate
fields.label: Date of signature
fields.description: The date you signed the declaration.

fields.name: wasFeeCharged
fields.label: Was a fee charged? (line 49000)
fields.description: If this return was completed by a tax professional, whether a fee was charged.

fields.name: efileNumber
fields.label: EFILE number (line 48900)
fields.description: 5-digit EFILE number, if applicable.

fields.name: taxProfessionalName
fields.label: Name of tax professional
fields.description: If this return was completed by a tax professional.

fields.name: taxProfessionalPhoneNumber
fields.label: Tax professional's telephone number
fields.description: Including area code.

documents.label: Form T1135, Foreign Income Verification Statement
Form T90, Income Exempt from Tax under the Indian Act
documents.sourceRef: T1 2022, Page 2, Indian Act - Exempt income

documents.label: Certification and declaration
documents.statement: I certify that the information given on this return and in any attached documents is correct, complete and fully discloses all of my income.
